title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 16 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 16/01/2024
Image reference: 2024-01-16_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-16-2024_img1.png
Bulkers : Bulker Values firmed small amounts across the board
Capesize BC (Newcastlemax) Mineral Qingdao (206,00 DWT, Jul 2020, Qingdao Yangfan) sold for USD 54.50 mil, VV Value USD 55.68 mil
Capesize BC Capt Tasos (182,300 DWT, Oct 2023, Namura) sold to Norden for USD 70.50 mil (SS/DD Passed), VV Value USD 71.00 mil
Post Panamax BC Flag Trias (93,500 DWT, Dec 2007, Namura) sold for USD 14.50 mil (DD Due), VV value USD 14.85 mil
Tankers : Tanker values in general firmed last week, notably mid age VLCC tonnage increased due to the previous weeks frontline deal
MR1 (Chem/Product) Pluto & Dinah (37,300 DWT, Oct 2008, Hyundai Mipo) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 41.75 mil, VV Value USD 43.72 mil
Containers : Values started to firm for Post Panamax and smaller from improved earnings and a short-term supply crunch in Asia, as a result of multiple diversions away via COGH
No notable sales last week
Image reference: 2024-01-16_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-16-2024_img2.jpg
